3278070.name: Zaraq Demo
3278070.description:
Zaraq is a roguelike deckbuilder where you have access to a forbidden and strangely addicting arcade from the 80's.

When you press roll themed symbols appear on the screen... and they appear to have synergy between them. Four colors are present:

Black, related to death ,dark and undead creatures.

White, related to purity and holiness.

Green, related to nature creatures.

Yellow, related to richness and realm of the human.

As you move, craft the best deck of symbols, artifact and spells to score the maximum amount of points.

Can you score the points and to pay the ticket price to next stage?

Demo Features:

9 stages of more than 20 in full version.

More than 50 symbols( demo include common, uncommon, rare. Full version will include legendary symbols)

More than 20 artifacts (demo include common, uncommon, rare. Full version will include more artifacts)

More than 20 spells (demo include common, uncommon, rare. Full version will include more spells)
3278070.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
